Transcrição Completa: 3 Social Media Management

 

[00:00] "So, this is how to sell social media services, which could be content creation. This could be lead generation. And I want to be clear in these next few videos, you're just going to you're going to see I'm going to act as though I am creating a perfect cold video pitch demonstrating exactly what I would do, what I would say, how I would say it for the specific service that we're talking about."

 

[00:23] "So, the first one, social media marketing. I'm going to use uh an influencer, a friend, Brandon Carter, somebody who has 1.5 million followers. To be clear, this could be for any business, any industry. This is just somebody that I picked out randomly um because I I just got done to watching some of his Insta stories. So anyway, shout out to Brandon. Um how to sell social media management."

 

[00:48] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Video Pitch Introduction"

 

NÚMEROS: 1.5 million followers

 

VISUAL: Demonstração de pitch de vídeo frio, estrutura de apresentação para serviços de social media

 

[00:51] "So the video would start. Hey Brandon, what's going on? You likely have no idea who I am. My name is Jeremy. I just wanted to reach out, give this video to you. You're going to find it valuable and you're going to be able to operate and execute on these exact strategies I'm going to show you here."

 

[01:07] "So, long story short, I found that with all the clients that I've worked with in the fitness industry and the people that I've helped just like you that already have a lot of content, there's so much more that can be done with it by distributing that content and in addition to that just kind of outsourcing um who's creating it for you, repurposing some of this stuff."

 

[01:28] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Gary Vee Content Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: 87 pieces of content, 1 hour and a half presentation

 

VISUAL: Estratégia de repurposing de conteúdo, transformação de uma apresentação em múltiplas peças

 

[01:30] "Gary Vee, I'm sure you're familiar with him. He actually has this presentation where he speaks for about an hour and a half or so and he ends up turning it into 87 pieces of content. The problem is that we find with people that we've helped, their existing teams inside of their staff are just kind of bogged down when they hear they have to create 87 additional pieces of content in addition to everything I'm sure that you have them doing right now actively in your team."

 

[01:58] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Service Pricing Structure"

 

NÚMEROS: $5K/month (knowledge transfer), $10K/month (hands-on service)

 

VISUAL: Duas opções de pricing, comparação entre transferência de conhecimento vs execução completa

 

[02:00] "So, long story short, uh what we're going to talk about is going to make you more money. It's going to drive you more leads. This is the exact process. We're not holding anything back. If you want us to skill transfer and knowledge transfer this into your existing staff or yourself if you're managing this, we'd be more than happy to. And it's 5K a month to do so. Uh, in addition to that, if you want us to do this hands-on, it costs 10K a month to do so, and we'd be happy to do either, but you're still going to find value in this."

 

[02:32] "And if you have a team that currently handles anything in this area, make sure you show them this."

 

[02:37] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Current Content Performance Analysis"

 

NÚMEROS: 5K-20K views average, 1.2 million views (top post), 2K-15K range typical, 11 days ago (post date)

 

VISUAL: Análise de performance de conteúdo existente, range de visualizações, comparação entre posts regulares e virais

 

[02:40] "So, long story short, every video that you're currently posting is doing between about 5K and almost 20k views given the video. Now, some of them, it looks like you're pumping pretty hard. Like this one here has over 1.2 million views. It was posted 11 days ago. But most of them are between the 2K and the 15K range on average."

 

[03:03] "So, what we find, especially since you're posting uh pretty widespan, looks like you're posting maybe once, twice a day, sometimes once every other day, and the content looks like you're having to shoot it every time rather than repurposing it from existing content, like presentations you've done."

 

[03:21] "I know you're a speaker. I looked you up on YouTube right before this and I saw all the different presentations you have in full that you could repurpose. Also, just out of some of these things that are five minutes long or 10 minutes long, the average attention span on content is about two and a half minutes on average before before somebody goes over to the next video."

 

[03:42] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Attention Span & Video Length Optimization"

 

NÚMEROS: 2.5 minutes average attention span, 5-10 minutes current video length

 

VISUAL: Comparação entre duração atual dos vídeos e tempo médio de atenção, oportunidade de otimização

 

[03:45] "So, if you would look at the threshold of how many people are actually getting to the end of each one of these, you'd probably find that it'd be in your benefit to shorten up the length of your videos, you could get the same points that you make in these videos across, use them for Instagram, and then distribute them."

 

[04:01] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Content Distribution Tools"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Demonstração da ferramenta Shaker.com, interface de templates para distribuição de conteúdo

 

[04:03] "So, here's what I would do if I were you. I would have different tools that you can use, uh, such as different apps like Shaker.com is a good example. And when you use Shaker, it enables you to plug in different videos and different images into different templates that you can plug up. Uh, this can be good for distributing the content."

 

[04:24] "You can also just go right into your actual ads manager, which can be accessed right up here in the top right corner. I'm sure I'm sure you know how to get there. You're spending a lot of money on ads."

 

[04:34] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Facebook Ads Manager - Campaign Objectives"

 

NÚMEROS: 2 different objectives

 

VISUAL: Interface do Facebook Ads Manager, localização do acesso no canto superior direito, estrutura de objetivos de campanha

 

[04:36] "Anyway, long story short, when you go into your account, you want to run two different objectives, okay? And I'll show you inside of my own account as an example here on what those different objectives are. You can do engagement campaigns or you can run video view campaigns."

 

[04:53] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Video Views Objective - ThruPlay"

 

NÚMEROS: 10 seconds charge point, 15 seconds optimization

 

VISUAL: Interface de configuração de objetivo de visualização de vídeo, opção ThruPlay destacada, estrutura de cobrança e otimização do Facebook

 

[04:55] "So, if you run a video view objective, you want to run this objective called through play, which gives you the ability to tell Facebook's AI that I want you to go find people who are going to watch this video all the way through and only charge me at 10 seconds."

 

[05:10] "So, when you create the objective type, once again, you'd click on video views. You'd go here and on the adset level, of course, you'd select the audience."

 

[05:20] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Audience Targeting Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Estratégia de retargeting omnipresente, lista de públicos: Facebook page, Instagram page, website traffic

 

[05:22] "If you want to remain omniresent in front of the people who you already been exposed to, like your Facebook page, your Instagram page, your website traffic, all of that, uh, that's what you'd want to target. Whatever countries you want to go after, of course, that's who you'd want to target."

 

[05:38] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Placement Best Practices"

 

NÚMEROS: 60-second video

 

VISUAL: Lista de placements recomendados: Feed, Instant Articles, Suggested Videos, otimização específica para Instagram

 

[05:40] "As far as the placements, I find best practices are the feed, instant articles, and suggested videos, especially when you're pushing content. And given that you're promoting on Instagram, of course, and it's a 60-second video, this is where you'd be doing that action on the adset level."

 

[05:57] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "ThruPlay Optimization Settings"

 

NÚMEROS: 15 seconds charge point

 

VISUAL: Interface de otimização do Facebook, configuração ThruPlay, algoritmo de busca por usuários com maior probabilidade de assistir até o final

 

[05:59] "Now, when you're optimizing it right here, you can see I only want to get charged when somebody watches my video through play, which means I want to get charged at 15 seconds. And it's going to optimize for finding people in the algorithm that are most likely to meet my objective of watching the video all the way through."

 

[06:18] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Engagement Campaign Alternative"

 

NÚMEROS: 3 seconds charge point

 

VISUAL: Segunda opção de objetivo de campanha, estrutura de cobrança por engajamento ou visualização curta

 

[06:20] "I'd run a second objective called an engagement campaign, which charges me every 15 uh I'm sorry, every 3 seconds that somebody watches or when they actually engage with the ad itself."

 

[06:31] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Daily Budget & ROI Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: $5/day budget

 

VISUAL: Estratégia de budget baixo com alto impacto, aumento de alcance e omnipresença de marca

 

[06:33] "So, long story short, these things can be done for five bucks a day. They significantly increase the reach and the omniresence of your overall brand. And listen, your existing staff that you have in your team, they're probably a little bit overwhelmed with all the things that you have them doing. They can probably post in a higher frequency."

 

[06:52] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Instagram Performance Analysis"

 

NÚMEROS: 146K followers (Instagram), 1.5 million followers (Facebook)

 

VISUAL: Análise de presença em redes sociais, comparação entre plataformas, reconhecimento de alta performance atual

 

[06:54] "I looked you up on Instagram as well. And you know, I see you're doing a great job there. You're killing the game. I mean, you're an influencer. Uh, in addition to that, you're posting in high frequency. You really got the game down on Instagram. 146K followers, 1.5 million on Facebook. I mean, you know what you're doing for sure."

 

[07:13] "I just want to make sure you understand that there's more to be made. And I'm sure you're aware of that as well, especially being somebody who's so progress driven."

 

[07:21] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Content Distribution Benefits"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Benefícios da distribuição paga: mais leads, mais receita, ROI rastreável, tudo mensurável

 

[07:23] "So if you start distributing your content, putting a little bit of a budget behind it, you're going to make more leads, you're going to make more money, and in addition to that, it's all ROI driven. It's all trackable."

 

[07:34] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Facebook Attribution Tool"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Ferramenta de atribuição do Facebook, rastreamento completo do ciclo de compra, conexão entre visualização de conteúdo e conversão final

 

[07:36] "When you're running content on the ad level, the great part about this, especially with Facebook's new attribution tool where they where they show the full cycle to somebody buying, you can actually have the Facebook pixel linked to when somebody sees this piece of content where they end up getting attributed to at the end of the day."

 

[07:55] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Full Funnel Content Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Processo completo: alcançar novas audiências + manter omnipresença com audiência existente, frequência controlada para evitar saturação

 

[07:57] "So it becomes a full process here of reaching new people and attracting new audiences with your content. In addition to that, you are having uh your existing brand and the existing people who've seen your brand stay omniresent in front of them and in a contextual way. Uh the video itself can have a frequency cap so they don't get aggressively swamped and bombarded by it. You know, they see all the different videos that you're running."

 

[08:23] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Service Delivery Options - Final Offer"

 

NÚMEROS: $10K/month (done-for-you), $5K/month (knowledge transfer)

 

VISUAL: Recap da estrutura de pricing, duas opções claras: execução completa pela agência vs transferência de conhecimento para equipe interna

 

[08:25] "And as I described, I have no problem with my staff, my agency using all the existing tools, softwares, doing it oursel. It's 10K if you want us to do that. It's only 5K though if you want us to just skill transfer, knowledge transfer everything I just spoke about in depth into your team."

 

[08:43] "And as I described at the beginning of this, this video will help demonstrate the exact steps that you and your team can take to do this yourselves. Uh anyway, I hope this helps and I look forward to hearing from you. My email and contact information are in the description below. Uh thanks Brandon. Keep doing your thing."

 

[09:02] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Distribution Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Estratégia de distribuição multi-canal: upload no YouTube + envio em todos os canais sociais

 

[09:04] "And then I'd stop the video. I'd upload it to YouTube and I would send it to him on all social channels. I'll see you in the next video."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

1.5 milhões de seguidores no Facebook (Brandon Carter)

146K seguidores no Instagram

87 peças de conteúdo criadas a partir de 1 apresentação (estratégia Gary Vee)

5K-20K visualizações médias por vídeo

1.2 milhões de visualizações no post de melhor performance

2K-15K range típico de visualizações

2.5 minutos de atenção média do público

5-10 minutos de duração atual dos vídeos

$5/dia de budget para distribuição de conteúdo

10 segundos: ponto de cobrança no ThruPlay

15 segundos: otimização de visualização completa

3 segundos: cobrança em campanhas de engajamento

60 segundos: duração recomendada para vídeos no Instagram

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Pitch de Vídeo Frio: Estrutura completa de abordagem para vendas de serviços de social media

Repurposing de Conteúdo: Transformar apresentações longas em múltiplas peças curtas

Distribuição Paga: Usar ads do Facebook para amplificar alcance orgânico

Dois Objetivos de Campanha: Video Views (ThruPlay) + Engagement

Retargeting Omnipresente: Manter marca presente para audiências já expostas

Otimização de Duração: Encurtar vídeos para match com atenção média

Frequency Cap: Controlar exposição para evitar saturação

Attribution Tracking: Rastrear ciclo completo até conversão

Multi-Platform Distribution: YouTube + todos os canais sociais

 

ESTRUTURA:

Ferramentas: Shaker.com (templates de conteúdo), Facebook Ads Manager, Facebook Pixel

Placements: Feed, Instant Articles, Suggested Videos

Targeting: Facebook page followers, Instagram followers, website traffic, geo-targeting

Posting Frequency: 1-2x por dia atualmente, oportunidade de aumentar

Team Structure: Transferência de conhecimento vs execução pela agência

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Opção 1 (Knowledge Transfer): $5K/mês

Opção 2 (Done-For-You): $10K/mês

Ad Budget Recomendado: $5/dia por campanha

ROI: 100% rastreável via Facebook Attribution Tool

 

DURAÇÃO: ~9 minutos FORMATO: Tutorial de pitch de vendas + demonstração prática de estratégia de social media management
